11:["$","$1","block-12",{"children":["$","ul","l-82",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-82-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"100xDevs: Strong execution, complete product surface, and real Solana utility fit this open-ended builder-first track."}],["$","li","l-82-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"RPC Fast: PrivateDAO is read-heavy and operationally sensitive, so reliable low-latency RPC and backend indexing materially improve UX and reviewer trust."}],["$","li","l-82-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"MagicBlock Privacy: MagicBlock private payment corridors now gate confidential token payouts, making privacy execution part of the actual treasury boundary rather than a future idea."}],["$","li","l-82-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Encrypt: REFHE and encrypted payout orchestration align with confidential capital market narratives better than generic private-wallet positioning."}]]}]}]
12:["$","$1","block-13",{"children":["$","h2","h2-85",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Differentiation"}]}]
13:["$","$1","block-14",{"children":["$","ul","l-92",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-92-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"PrivateDAO is not only a privacy primitive. It joins private governance, confidential payroll, treasury release, runtime evidence, and reviewer-visible operator flows in one product."}],["$","li","l-92-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Comparable governance projects emphasize anonymous voting or workflow automation, while payment privacy projects emphasize invoices or privacy pools. PrivateDAO bridges both into organizational operations."}],["$","li","l-92-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"The repo exposes a live frontend, Anchor program, backend read node, generated manifests, and submission-ready review artifacts instead of relying on a single demo narrative."}]]}]}]

15:["$","$1","block-16",{"children":["$","ul","l-102",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-102-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"As of 2026-04-06, PrivateDAO is strongest where privacy, governance discipline, and operational reviewability intersect."}],["$","li","l-102-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"It is less comparable to trading-focused privacy systems than to governance or treasury operating systems with confidential execution paths."}],["$","li","l-102-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Some remaining mainnet steps still require external runtime captures and audit closure, and the analysis does not overstate those as solved."}]]}]}]
